hypothesis: Optimizing aromatic interactions at position 5 and charge complementarity at position 6 will enhance binding affinity, as evidenced by the previous best ddG.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: Structural validity requires stricter ddG and clash thresholds to balance affinity with molecular packing quality

proposed_changes.rationale: Top candidates show significantly lower ddG than threshold, suggesting current threshold is too lenient for structural validation
Zero pLDDT and dock scores indicate poor structural packing, likely due to excessive clashes
